caption: A woman with blonde-highlighted hair tied up in a bun is seated in a podcast studio, wearing black over-ear headphones and a black t-shirt. She is positioned in front of a professional black microphone. In the background, a screen displays the name "Johnson" in red text, and a sign above it reads "Employee Only". To her right, a yellow vertical beam separates the studio space from a black wall featuring a logo that says "BOSS TALK 101" and smaller text below it. Another logo on the screen says "BOSS TALK 101 PODCAST". The woman maintains a slight, thoughtful smile and looks toward someone off-camera to her right. Across the sequence, she remains nearly stationary, with only subtle shifts in her facial expression and gaze, while the camera angle and lighting remain constant.
